title: MYB
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Call Doctors Physicians, Not “Providers,” Specialty Group Says
items.description: A new ACP policy paper says physicians should not be called providers. The term undermines professionalism, ethics, and trust, according to ACP.

items.title: Practical Enterprise AI Came Of Age At The 2026 World Economic Forum
items.description: This year in Davos, executives from the tech world and beyond focused on the most relevant use cases of AI for solving real-world business problems.
